judgment.summary: High-growth cybersecurity player with strong gross margins and cash flow, but trading at a premium valuation with negative net profitability.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.12 beat the 1.10 estimate by 1.6%, with the next earnings date set for 2026-06-03.
positives: Gross margin 74.8% — indicates strong core profitability on sales.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.60B — shows robust cash generation.
Total cash $5.23B — provides a massive liquidity buffer.
Analyst growth est for current Q 46.2% — suggests high expectations for near-term expansion.
negatives: Forward P/E 96.25 — indicates a very high valuation relative to future earnings.
Profit margin -3.4% — shows the company is currently operating at a loss.
Price/Sales (TTM) 31.42 — suggests a steep premium on revenue.
Mean analyst target $497.55 — current price is trading well above the consensus target.

news.paragraph: CrowdStrike is showing strong momentum, recently reaching new highs and receiving a price target hike from RBC to $650. The company is also being highlighted as a key player in the cybersecurity space amid intensifying AI-driven attacks. Options traders should consider this recent wave of positive analyst sentiment and upward price action.
